sections.description: TechZapp AI Writer helps you generate high-quality technology blog posts using AI. Supports OpenAI, Groq, and Google Gemini.
sections.changelog:
1.1.0 — 2026-06-28

  • Added multi-provider AI support: Groq and Google Gemini
  • Provider switcher in Settings with per-provider API key management
  • Fixed CSS loading in WordPress admin
  • Added GitHub-based automatic update system

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Dashboard with trending topics from Hacker News, GitHub, Reddit, Dev.to
  • AI article generation with configurable tone, word count, and audience
  • Rich text editor with improve/expand/shorten AI actions
  • Save as WordPress draft
sections.installation:
1. Download the plugin zip from GitHub Releases
  2. Upload to WordPress via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
  3. Activate the plugin
  4. Go to TechZapp AI Writer → Settings and add your API key
